calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-22-2004 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. 626-6494 for Plaintiff BRIAN SCHLESINGER, TRUSTEE and opposing party
No appearance by the opposing party. Ms. Keith represented in open court that she notified opposing counsel DONALD BLOOM. In addition, the Court's tentative ruling was "Hearing Required". Argued and the Court DENIED Defendant LINDA GREEN's motion to vacate default and default judgment. Order signed in open court. (301/jlw/ac) Christina T. Paxton, CSR 1558

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-14-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Matter comes on regularly for prove-up in Department 514. Present are Brenda Cruz Keith, counsel for plaintiff; also present plaintiff Brian Schlesinger; no appearance by defendants Charmane Green or Linda Green.
Plaintiff Brian Schlesinger is sworn and testifies on his own behalf.
Plaintiffs Exhibit 1 (Lease Agreement) and Exhibit 2 (3 day notice to quit) are marked for identification and admitted into evidence.
The Court awards judgment in favor of plaintiff Brian Schlesinger and against defendants Charmane Green and Linda Green for possession of the premises located at 7416 Geary Blvd., San Francisco, CA 94121, plus back rent of $1600.00, holdover damages of $2399.85 and costs in the sum of $198.30, for a total award of $4,198.15.
The exhibits are ordered withdrawn.
Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.,; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; Reporter: Joyce Long (D. 514)
